video_subject: An armored road warrior vehicle driven by a determined Indian man with authentic South Asian features, racing across a massive desert wasteland filled with rusted metal ruins. An enormous sandstorm swallows the horizon behind it.
motion_dynamics: High-velocity desert racing; thick plumes of dust and debris flying from the tires; intense vibration and heat haze; the sandstorm looms with terrifying, fast-moving scale.
temporal_storyboard: 0s: The vehicle tears across the screen, dust kicked up in the foreground against a backdrop of ruins.
4s: Mid-shot of the driver through the dusty windshield, focused and intense as the sandstorm closes in.
8s: The sandstorm begins to swallow the vehicle completely as it speeds towards a distant ruin.
visual_style: Post-Apocalyptic Survival Blockbuster. Camera: Cinema Digital 35mm, Lens: Anamorphic Classic, Focal Length: 24mm, Aperture: f/5.6. Saturated Film stock, Saturated Apocalyptic Desert movie look. Deep shadows and high contrast.
negative_prompt: shaky camera (excessive), low framerate, flickering, distorted faces, text, watermarks, morphing artifacts, clean vehicles, lush greenery.
